title: gomphrena perennis var. subalpina
intro: Gomphrena perennis var. subalpina, also known as the globe amaranth, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gomphrena perennis var. subalpina include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with asthma, allergies, and other respiratory conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
